mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.perm_key FROM ( SELECT rp.perm_id FROM sys_role_perm rp INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT up.perm_id FROM sys_user_perm up WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} ) t INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON p.id = t.perm_id WHERE p.del_flag = 0 AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.perm_key
SELECT p.* FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_menu_permission mp ON mp.perm_id = p.id WHERE mp.menu_id = #{menuId} AND p.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY p.id DESC
SELECT perm_id FROM sys_role_perm WHERE role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY perm_id

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.perm_key, p.status, COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.title ORDER BY m.sort SEPARATOR ' / '), '') AS menu_titles FROM sys_permission p LEFT JOIN sys_menu_permission mp ON mp.perm_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON m.id = mp.menu_id AND m.del_flag = 0 WHERE p.del_flag = 0 AND p.status = 1
AND (p.name LIKE #{likeKeyword} OR p.perm_key LIKE #{likeKeyword})
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_menu_permission x WHERE x.perm_id = p.id AND x.menu_id = #{menuId} )
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.perm_key, p.status ORDER BY p.id DESC
